---
title: "Bibliography & Filmography"
nocite: |
  @*
---

This page contains the complete bibliography and filmography for the course, including all films screened and scholarly sources referenced in weekly readings.

::: {#refs-print}
## Bibliography

```{=html}
<div id="bibliography-content" style="display: none;"></div>
```
:::

::: {#refs-films}
## Filmography

```{=html}
<div id="filmography-content" style="display: none;"></div>
```
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Get the main references div
    const mainRefs = document.getElementById('refs');
    if (!mainRefs) return;
    
    const allEntries = mainRefs.querySelectorAll('.csl-entry');
    const printRefs = document.getElementById('refs-print');
    const filmRefs = document.getElementById('refs-films');
    
    // Film keys - entries that should go in filmography
    const filmKeys = [
        'tourneur_1942_cat', 'malle_1958_elevator', 'losey_1963_servant',
        'antonioni_1964_red', 'teshigahara_1966_face', 'clarke_1967_portrait',
        'varda_1968_black', 'maysles_1970_gimme', 'fassbinder_1970_american',
        'kubrick_1975_barry', 'burnett_1978_killer', 'tarkovsky_1979_stalker',
        'kieslowski_1993_blue', 'zwerin_1994_music', 'andersen_1996_red',
        'andersen_2003_los'
    ];
    
    allEntries.forEach(function(entry) {
        const entryId = entry.id;
        const isFilm = filmKeys.some(key => entryId.includes(key));
        
        if (isFilm) {
            filmRefs.appendChild(entry.cloneNode(true));
        } else {
            printRefs.appendChild(entry.cloneNode(true));
        }
    });
    
    // Hide the main refs div
    if (mainRefs) {
        mainRefs.style.display = 'none';
    }
});
</script>
```
